description: Add a chemical record for 'Benzene' (CAS 71-43-2) to the facility 'PetroChem Laboratories' in CAMEO Data Manager. If the facility does not exist, create it using a valid US address. The record must include NFPA 704 ratings (Health: 2, Flammability: 3, Instability/Reactivity: 0) and DOT/Shipping information (UN Number: 1114, Hazard Class: 3, Packing Group: II). Save the completed record.
